intake.label: Structured Brief
intake.description: Prompt parsing is materially better than v1, but still heuristic and local-only.

concepts.label: Concept Generation
concepts.description: ComfyUI is the default concept backend. The procedural generator remains debug-only.

refine.label: Refinement
refine.description: Refinement creates new concept candidates and records lineage from the selected concept.

layer_review.label: Layer Review
layer_review.description: Layers are still generated from a synthetic part library instead of extracted concept art.

rig_review.label: Rig Review
rig_review.description: Rigging is procedural and only validates the current placeholder downstream pipeline.

production.label: Production
production.description: Rendering and packing are deterministic, but still depend on synthetic layers and rig data.

qa.label: QA
qa.description: QA reports only implemented image heuristics and does not claim semantic certainty.

export.label: Export
export.description: Exports are usable, but inherit the experimental upstream and placeholder downstream stages.
